name: Phishing Rookie
description: Complete any level of Phishing Frenzy.

name: Password Apprentice
description: Complete any level of Password Protector.

name: Malware Hunter
description: Complete any level of Malware Mayhem.

name: Firewall Novice
description: Complete any level of Firewall Defender.

name: Scam Spotter
description: Complete any level of Scam Spotter.

name: Beginner Completionist
description: Complete all 5 Beginner level games.

name: Intermediate Operative
description: Complete all 5 Medium level games.

name: Elite Cyber Warrior
description: Complete all 5 Hard (Elite) level games.

name: 7-Day Warrior
description: Maintain a 7-day learning streak.

name: 14-Day Champion
description: Maintain a 14-day learning streak.

name: 30-Day Legend
description: Maintain an incredible 30-day streak.

name: 500 XP Club
description: Reach 500 total XP.

name: 1000 XP Breaker
description: Reach 1,000 total XP.

name: 2500 XP Titan
description: Reach 2,500 total XP — a true cyber titan.

name: 5K XP Overlord
description: Reach 5,000 XP. Absolute mastery of the academy.

name: Phishing Master
description: Complete both Beginner and Medium Phishing levels.

name: Password Guardian
description: Complete both Beginner and Medium Password levels.

name: Malware Architect
description: Complete the Hard Malware Mayhem level.

name: Firewall Commander
description: Complete the Hard Firewall Defender level.

name: Master Investigator
description: Complete the Hard Scam Spotter level.

name: All Domains Cleared
description: Complete at least 1 level in all 5 game categories.

name: Academy Graduate
description: Complete all 15 modules across all levels — certified elite operative.
